/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,ros2_total_demo_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/ros2_total_demo/ros2_total_demo_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-38-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/ros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/ros2_total_demo/_ros2_total_demo_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o   -L/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-11.4/lib64:/home/rm/ros2_ws/src/ros2_total_demo/build/ros2_total_demo/rosidl_generator_py/ros2_total_demo:/home/rm/ros2_ws/src/ros2_total_demo/build/ros2_total_demo:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: rosidl_generator_py/ros2_total_demo/libros2_total_demo__python.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libros2_total_demo__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so libros2_total_demo__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so
